docket_entries.description: BANKRUPTCY CHAPTER 11 FILED BY GSG PUBLISHING #LA92-42889-SB.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELIOPOULOS LOUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FACES INTERNATIONAL $3,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,962.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,950.00 FILED BY ELIOPOULOS LOUIS AS TO DEFENDANT FACES INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
FILE SENT TO JUDGE QUIDACHAY FOR ORDER.
ORDER STAYING ALL PROCEEDINGS, AND TO QUASHED WRT OF EXECUTION TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO GEORGE GOLDBERG (FACES INT'L) RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-11-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-25-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FACES INTERNATIONAL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FACES INTERNATIONAL
